description: Evaneos is a travel marketplace focused on tailor-made trips arranged with local travel agencies. Its public website also includes a partner portal describing marketing partnerships such as widgets, affiliation, newsletters, and itinerary feed integrations.
summary: evaneos.fr exposes a documented partner-facing HTTP API for customizable itinerary feeds, but no public developer documentation, machine-readable spec, CLI, GraphQL API, or MCP server was found.
